rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ‘Hypothetical’: Grim RBA warning downplayed
news.snippet: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has dismissed a stark warning from the RBA governor on a cost-of-living measure reportedly included in the federal budget.

news.title: Zenith weighs corporate pathways for emerging WA gold hub
news.snippet: Zenith Minerals has launched a strategic review to assess its corporate and asset-level options across its gold and lithium portfolio, appointing Argonaut as financial adviser.

news.title: RBA has just ‘guaranteed’ Aussie stagflation
news.snippet: An Australian finance expert has hit out at the RBA, warning that living standards are now almost certain to plummet – fast.

news.title: ‘Have you seen the share price!?’ Controversial AI founder slams short attack
news.snippet: Short sellers behind a damning report on Aussie startup Sharon AI have been burnt spectacularly after its shares soared in a market enamoured with the boom in artificial intelligence.

news.title: Thick, shallow gold extends Pacgold pit in South Australia
news.snippet: Pacgold has hit thick, shallow gold mineralisation just outside its Vertigo resource in South Australia, with results likely to add ounces and potentially extend the existing open pit.

news.title: Albo’s new fuel plan amid Coalition snub
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese has made a big announcement on Australia’s fuel security after a high-stakes meeting with state and territory leaders.

news.title: Aurum keeps piling on the ounces at giant Côte d’Ivoire gold play
news.snippet: Aurum Resources hit thick gold intersections at its Boundiali project in Cote d’Ivoire, with new drilling backing continuity at the BDT2 target as modelling continues.

news.title: Adelaide Crows to feed off returning skipper's energy
Lindian powers towards rare earths production lift off in Malawi
news.snippet: Lindian Resources remains on track for first rare earths production in Malawi by late 2026, with mining activities and plant construction now ramping up on site.

news.title: Moonlight delivers 450m strike boost to Qld gold system
news.snippet: Phase two drilling at Moonlight Resources’ Leo Grande prospect in Qld has extended the gold footprint, with wide near-surface gold hits and several holes ending in mineralisation.

news.title: Bombshell report reveals $3bn worker rip-off
news.snippet: Sham contracting, falsified pay slips and unpaid super are just some of the ways Aussie employers are ripping off one group of workers.

news.title: ‘Outlier’ behind Aussie dollar’s 4-year high
news.snippet: The surprising reason for the Australian dollar being propelled to a four-year high has been revealed.
